Vendored `zig-protobuf`

Source repository:
https://github.com/Arwalk/zig-protobuf

Vendored source basis:
- package version `2.0.0`
- local source imported from Zig's cached package contents to match the
  generated `tensorboard.pb.zig` API already used by this project

Imported files:
- `tensorboard/src/third_party/protobuf/protobuf.zig`
- `tensorboard/third_party/protobuf/LICENSE.md`

The upstream project is licensed under MIT. Keep this notice and the vendored
license file when redistributing the vendored source.
